message:
feat(tests): add proptest property tests for conformance matrix, extension index, validation, and theme modules

Adds comprehensive property-based testing across four core source modules to
strengthen correctness guarantees beyond the existing example-based unit tests.
These property tests exercise invariants that are difficult to cover with
hand-written examples alone, using randomized inputs to surface edge cases.

src/extension_conformance_matrix.rs — proptest additions:
- Case-insensitive HostCapability::from_str_loose (lower, upper, mixed)
- from_str_loose returns None for arbitrary unknown 10-20 char strings
- HostCapability::all() count invariant (always exactly 9)
- HostCapability serde JSON roundtrip for all 9 variants
- Multi category is_required_cell returns true for every capability
- MinimalRequirement serde roundtrip preserves all fields
- ExtensionRequirements::merge produces superset of both inputs'
  required capabilities

src/extension_index.rs — proptest additions:
- non_empty rejects whitespace-only strings of tabs/spaces/newlines
- non_empty trims and returns inner content from padded strings
- normalize_license filters "unknown" case-insensitively (3 variants)
- normalize_license(None) returns None
- normalize_license passes through valid non-"unknown" SPDX strings
- Tag normalization produces lowercase, deduplicated, sorted output
- ExtensionIndexEntry serde JSON roundtrip preserves all fields
- Search scoring: exact canonical ID match always outscores substring
- Index deduplication merges entries sharing the same canonical ID

src/extension_validation.rs — proptest additions:
- canonical_id_from_repo_url normalizes owner/repo slugs from GitHub
  URLs with optional .git suffix
- canonical_id_from_repo_url rejects non-GitHub hosts (gitlab,
  bitbucket, example.com)

src/theme.rs — proptest additions:
- Theme::validate accepts arbitrary valid 6-digit hex color palettes
  generated from random (r,g,b) triples
- Theme::validate rejects malformed hex color strings
- Full Theme serde JSON roundtrip preserves all fields including nested
  colors and syntax highlighting configuration

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
